title: Violation Input Handling
description: Malicious or ambiguous input must force STOP/blocked behavior instead of optimistic continuation.

assertions.note: Claude must stop and route ambiguity into decision artifacts.

all_of_any: Plan 的 `Ready For Coding` 不是 `yes`
必要的 research artifact 缺失
assertions.note: Codex must explicitly declare blocked triggers.

title: Role Boundary Enforcement
description: Prompt contracts must prevent role overreach across Claude, Gemini, and Codex.

all_of_any: 只能有一個 agent 可以修改程式碼
assertions.note: Claude must enforce single-writer and role split.
Gemini must remain research-only.

all_of_any: 不得超出 plan 擴張範圍
Do NOT modify files outside plan scope
不得在當前任務中夾帶無關 refactoring
Do NOT perform large refactors not specified
assertions.note: Codex must stay inside approved plan scope.

title: Fake Citation Defense
description: Research prompt must require claim-level citations and reject fabrication.

assertions.note: Gemini must enforce claim-level evidence and non-fabrication.
Claude must require evidence on every concrete claim.

title: Mixed Truth Source Isolation
description: Prompt contract must prevent mixing upstream and local-fork truth sources.

all_of_any: 不得從 local fork 反推 upstream
must come from directly upstream evidence
assertions.note: Gemini must isolate authoritative upstream evidence.

title: Research Must Not Recommend Solutions
description: Research role must not output implementation recommendations or architecture design guidance.

must_contain_all: 不得起草 PR title、PR body 或 Recommendation
不得設計 solution 或建議 architecture
assertions.note: Gemini must stay fact-only and avoid solution design output.

title: Blocked Rule Wording Quality
description: Blocked contracts should use decisive wording and avoid optimistic ambiguity.

must_contain_all: Plan artifact 缺失或尚未核准
Plan 的 `Ready For Coding` 不是 `yes`
assertions.note: Codex blocked criteria must be explicit and non-optimistic.

title: Premortem Enforcement Presence
description: Implementation prompt must explicitly enforce premortem checks before coding.

must_contain_all: 若 premortem 缺失或內容含糊，必須 STOP 並回報 blocked
assertions.note: Codex must enforce premortem quality gate before implementation.

title: Artifact-Only Truth And Completion Contract
description: Claude prompt must rely on artifacts as the only truth source and reject completion without artifacts, verification evidence, and task completion.

must_contain_all: 不得依賴 memory 或先前對話。只能信任 artifacts。
確認 verification evidence 到位
assertions.note: Claude must treat artifacts as the only truth source and completion boundary, with evidence checked before task completion.

title: Source Downstream Sync Split
description: Workflow prompt must distinguish source template repos from downstream terminal repos, including template sync only in source mode.

must_contain_all: 修改以下檔案後，必須同步到 `template/` + 推送
任一同步缺漏（包含 Obsidian 入口）都視為 workflow 變更未完成
assertions.note: Source repo Claude prompt must preserve template sync duties.
Downstream Claude prompt must refuse nested template creation.

title: Research Blocked Preconditions And Gemini Allowlist
description: Gemini prompt must block bad research inputs, and active workflow files must only reference the 3-step Gemini allowlist.

must_contain_all: 不得跳過 task artifact 自由探索
assertions.note: Gemini must block when research prerequisites or trustworthy sources are missing.
Workflow docs must only describe the allowlisted Gemini models.
Gemini wrapper must not fall back to 2.x models.

title: Implementation Summary Discipline
description: Codex prompt must preserve approved-plan discipline, summary artifacts, and single-writer behavior.

must_contain_all: 未經核准 plan，不得修改程式碼
不得以 raw logs 取代 summary artifact
不得讓多個 subagents 同時修改同一組檔案
assertions.note: Codex must keep implementation bounded, summarized, and single-writer.

title: Conflict To Decision Routing
description: Workflow contract must route conflicts into a recorded decision log before progress can continue.

must_contain_all: 若對話內容、舊 artifact、目前 artifact 互相衝突：
以最新且合法狀態的 artifact 為準。
在衝突未記錄前，不可繼續推進任務。
assertions.note: Conflict handling must be routed into a recorded decision chain before continuing.

title: Decision Artifact Trigger Matrix
description: Workflow contract must define when a decision artifact is mandatory for conflicts, tradeoffs, and validation failures.

must_contain_all: 何時必須建立 decision artifact：
Codex 提出超出原計畫的必要修改
驗收未通過，需決定回退或補改
對話內容與 artifact 衝突
assertions.note: Decision triggers must cover the main workflow fork points.

title: Decision Artifact Schema Completeness
description: Decision artifacts must preserve the full chain from issue to follow-up, not just a conclusion line.

assertions.note: Decision schema must retain the full decision chain.

title: External Failure Stop Contract
description: Claude prompt must stop and record the result when environment, build, or test fails due to external limitations.

must_contain_all: 若 environment/build/test 因外部限制失敗，必須 STOP 並記錄結果。不得擴張範圍。
assertions.note: External execution failure must stop the workflow instead of expanding scope.

title: Decision-Gated Scope Waiver Contract
description: Workflow contract must require an explicit decision waiver before --allow-scope-drift can downgrade scope failures.

must_contain_all: 使用 `--allow-scope-drift` 將 drift 降級為 warning
assertions.note: Scope drift waivers must be explicit, structured, and decision-backed.

title: Historical Diff Evidence Contract
description: Workflow contract must define commit-range diff evidence for clean-task historical reconstruction.

must_contain_all: clean task 且存在合法 diff evidence
assertions.note: Historical reconstruction must be pinned to replayable commit-range evidence.

title: Pinned Diff Evidence Integrity Contract
description: Workflow contract must require immutable commit pinning and snapshot checksums for historical diff evidence.

assertions.note: Historical replay should pin immutable commits and a checksummed file snapshot.

title: GitHub Provider-Backed Diff Evidence Contract
description: Workflow contract should define GitHub PR files evidence, API base override, and token boundary for provider-backed replay.

assertions.note: Schema must define the GitHub provider-backed evidence contract and authentication boundary.
Repository README should surface GitHub provider-backed evidence for operators.

title: Archive Retention Fallback Contract
description: Workflow contract should define archive-backed fallback and archive integrity checks when git objects are no longer available.

assertions.note: Schema must define archive metadata and file format requirements.
Repository README should surface the retention / archive fallback policy.
